title: Tabloid exec: Stories were killed for Trump
shortDescription: A media executive took the stand in Donald Trump's hush money trial. It's Tuesday's news.

title: Disgraced former Rep. George Santos ends reelection campaign
shortDescription: The disgraced former lawmaker isn't running for reelection, but teased he will "be back."

title: Georgia governor signs bill limiting kids' access to the internet
shortDescription: The Peach State has a new law that requires parental consent before allowing minors to create social media accounts.

title: Biden to give 2 commencement addresses as protests erupt at colleges
shortDescription: President Biden will deliver commencement addresses next month at Morehouse College and West Point, the White House announced.

title: Election day live updates: What to watch in Pennsylvania's pivotal races
shortDescription: All eyes will be on Pennsylvania on Tuesday, as the key swing states holds its presidential primary and other pivotal elections.

title: Where do Trump and Biden stand on a TikTok ban? What to know
shortDescription: The House passed a bill Saturday that would ban the social media platform unless its parent company ByteDance decides to sell it.

title: Former National Enquirer exec killed stories for Trump before election
shortDescription: David Pecker, who ran National Enquirer, testified about paying to kill stories that could hurt Donald Trump's presidential bid.

title: Post falsely claims Trump missed daughter's graduation | Fact check
shortDescription: Pictures and news articles about the day show the former president attended his daughter's college graduation.

title: Can Biden put right-leaning Florida in play? President sees an opening on abortion
shortDescription: The president wants to keep his GOP rival in the abortion hot seat for the entire 2024 White House campaign. A Florida law gives him an opening.

title: Trump trial day 5 recap: witness testimony begins | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Opening arguments in Donald Trump's hush money trial. Judge approves safeguards for Trump's $175 million civil business fraud appeal bond.

title: Ohio Republicans have their sights set on changing state voting laws
shortDescription: Gov. Mike DeWine said the issue of election integrity in Ohio is settled. Not all Republicans in the Legislature agree.

title: Trump trial Day 6 recap: National Enquirer's David Pecker testifies
shortDescription: Live updates from Donald Trump hush money criminal trial as David Pecker testifies about how National Enquirer assisted Trump's 2016 campaign.

title: Judge weighs gag order fines in Trump hush money trial
shortDescription: Judge Juan Merchan will hear arguments Tuesday about whether Donald Trump violated his gag order in the hush money trial by attacking Stormy Daniels.

title: In landmark Supreme Court case, Trump's test case is Richard Nixon
shortDescription: The justices are likely to reject the claim of absolute immunity. But even if they do, Trump may already have won by delaying his election interference trial.

title: Wyoming Republicans endorse Trump, censure governor
shortDescription: The Cowboy State's GOP convention gives Trump the nod and censures Republican Governor Mark Gordon

title: Donald Trump's hush money trial begins
shortDescription: Donald Trump's hush money trial is now underway with prosecutors and the defense presenting opening arguments to a 12-person jury.

title: And now, Trump's trial really begins
shortDescription: Opening statements began in Donald Trump's New York hush money trial. It's Monday's news.

title: Sanders, AOC boost Joe Biden's climate agenda on Earth Day
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announces $7 billion in grants to help provide solar power for nearly a million low-income families.
